_comment: Edit these values per partner. After editing, run a literal find/replace across whitelabel/pages/*.html — there is no build step. The HTML files contain the placeholders verbatim.

theme_tokens._comment: These match the CSS custom properties at the top of pages/index.html. To rebrand the look, search-replace the hex values in the :root block of each HTML file (or, if you set up a build later, inject these as CSS variables).

demo_link._comment: The 'Live demo →' link in the nav. Defaults to the HeyRoya demo until the partner has their own deployment. Update href in pages/index.html when ready.
